title: Cloudflare Access
excerpt: description: Validate Cloudflare Access JWT assertions in Pages Functions using this Plugin. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The Cloudflare Access Pages Plugin is a middleware to validate Cloudflare Access JWT assertions. It also includes an API to lookup additional information about a given user's JWT. npm i @cloudflare/pages-plugin-cloudflare-access
